title: Bump github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit from 0.10.0 to 0.10.1
body:
Bumps [github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit](https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit) from 0.10.0 to 0.10.1.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit's releases.

v0.10.1

Notable changes since v0.10.0:

  • Update Go to 1.15 (#167)
  • Guess default lxc-user-nic path on various distributions (#163, thanks to @zhsj)
  • Update misc dependencies

Build log: https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/runs/1122362848

Commits
  • 64ccfee v0.10.1
  • ac32a93 Merge pull request #174 from rootless-containers/dependabot/go_modules/github...
  • 7e45586 build(deps): bump github.com/moby/sys/mountinfo from 0.1.3 to 0.2.0
  • 36f981d Merge pull request #171 from rootless-containers/dependabot/go_modules/github...
  • ce8c963 build(deps): bump github.com/google/uuid from 1.1.1 to 1.1.2
  • 94152fb Merge pull request #170 from rootless-containers/dependabot/go_modules/github...
  • e97b8c3 pkg/port/socat: skip flaky test
  • ad04f99 build(deps): bump github.com/gofrs/flock from 0.7.3 to 0.8.0
  • 20dc950 Merge pull request #169 from rootless-containers/dependabot/go_modules/github...
  • 469f058 build(deps): bump github.com/gorilla/mux from 1.7.4 to 1.8.0
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

comments.body: @AkihiroSuda Looks like the latest rootlesskit is broken for building darwin?

Unrelated to rootlesskit

```
[+0047s] # github.com/docker/docker/pkg/term
[+0047s] vendor/github.com/docker/docker/pkg/term/tc.go:13:28: undefined: unix.SYS_IOCTL
[+0047s] vendor/github.com/docker/docker/pkg/term/tc.go:18:28: undefined: unix.SYS_IOCTL
[+0047s] vendor/github.com/docker/docker/pkg/term/termios_bsd.go:24:31: undefined: unix.SYS_IOCTL
[+0047s] vendor/github.com/docker/docker/pkg/term/termios_bsd.go:37:31: undefined: unix.SYS_IOCTL
```
Well the rootless kit update is triggering it.

So this is the problem.

```
-       golang.org/x/sys v0.0.0-20200810151505-1b9f1253b3ed
+       golang.org/x/sys v0.0.0-20200909081042-eff7692f9009
```
github.com/docker/docker/pkg/term was moved to https://github.com/moby/term , and it supports the latest x/sys/unix
